rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Elec. Code §254.124, which governs campaign finance reporting deadlines for specific-purpose committees supporting or opposing candidates or measures.
quote: In addition to other required reports, for each election in which a specific-purpose committee supports or opposes a candidate or measure, the committee's campaign treasurer shall file two reports.
_note: No relationship between the proposed tax exemption change and this election reporting rule.
